diff:
diff --git a/src/parsers.py b/src/parsers.py
index bd941b3..f0da590 100644
--- a/src/parsers.py
+++ b/src/parsers.py
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def parse_tags(text):
-    return [part for part in text.split(",")]
+    return [part.strip() for part in text.split(",") if part.strip()]
diff --git a/src/service.py b/src/service.py
index ab3abe2..d965d69 100644
--- a/src/service.py
+++ b/src/service.py
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
+from src.parsers import parse_tags
+
 def normalize_tag_list(text):
-    return sorted({part.lower() for part in text.split(",") if part})
+    return sorted({tag.lower() for tag in parse_tags(text)})
